title: Extruded wing protection system and device
abstract: Systems, devices, and methods for an extruded wing protection and control surface comprising: a channel proximate a leading edge of the control surface, a knuckle disposed about the channel, a leading void, a trailing void, and a separator dividing the leading void and the trailing void; and a plurality of notches disposed in the extruded control surface proximate the leading edge of the control surface.
claims: 1. A method comprising: extruding a control surface, wherein the extruded control surface comprises a channel and a knuckle disposed about the channel, wherein the knuckle comprises a semi-circular portion and a leading edge portion, wherein the leading edge portion extends from the semi-circular portion toward a bottom side of the control surface, and wherein an opening of the knuckle formed by the semi-circular portion and the leading edge portion is toward the bottom side of the control surface and open to an outside.
